__warnings.note: English: 'Month of Mhoro'. Kept the Shona word 'Mhoro' verbatim — Rwen's signature greeting carries through. Translated as 'Mhoro 之月'. Alternative: '问候之月'.

English: 'Halfway Tree' — a place reference (Halfway Tree is a famous landmark in Kingston, Jamaica; here used metaphorically for the halfway point). Translated as '半途之树'. Reviewer: this metaphor may not land for a Mainland reader; consider '行至中途' or '半山之处' as alternatives.
Uses {{total}} placeholder — kept intact. 'Rwendo Graduate' translated as 'Rwendo 毕业生'.
Achievement titles aim for short, evocative Chinese — many are looser adaptations rather than literal translations. Reviewer free to rewrite for flair.

streak_30.title: Mhoro 之月
streak_30.description: 连胜 30 天。Rwen 为你骄傲。
